raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find files where group has only read permission (i.e., group permissions are r--, no w or x). Use find with -perm. For group read only: mode 0400? Wait file perms: group bits: 4. So we want group bits exactly 4. Use -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Or simpler: -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Also ensure not other perms? Only group read. So command: find /workspace -type f -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Then ls -l. But task: long list all files. So use find ... -ls. Provide command.

Only group read. So command: find /workspace -type f -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Then ls -l. But task: long list all files. So use find ... -ls. Provide command.
